message:
feat: Improve HTML export and daemon client functionality

Enhance template rendering, library exports, daemon communication,
and TUI interactions along with E2E test improvements.

- Update src/html_export/template.rs rendering logic
- Enhance src/lib.rs public API
- Improve daemon_client.rs communication
- Update tui.rs user interactions
- Enhance E2E tests for offline and print scenarios

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
